'''ganara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feaste|feaste]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feaste|feaste]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ganara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gænæræth|gænæræth]] || [[word:gænæræj|gænæræj]] || [[word:gænæræsh|gænæræsh]] || [[word:gænæræ|gænæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gananarath|gananarath]] || [[word:gananaraj|gananaraj]] || [[word:gananarash|gananarash]] || [[word:gananara|gananara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganarath|ganarath]] || [[word:ganaraj|ganaraj]] || [[word:ganarash|ganarash]] || [[word:ganara|ganara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganafrath|ganafrath]] || [[word:ganafraj|ganafraj]] || [[word:ganafrash|ganafrash]] || [[word:ganafraf|ganafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ganaratha|ganaratha]] || [[word:ganaraja|ganaraja]] || [[word:ganarasha|ganarasha]] || [[word:ganaraka|ganaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ganarath|ganarath]] || [[word:ganaraj|ganaraj]] || [[word:ganarash|ganarash]] || [[word:ganara|ganara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ganarathal|ganarathal]] || [[word:ganarajal|ganarajal]] || [[word:ganarashal|ganarashal]] || [[word:ganarakal|ganarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ganarathatha|ganarathatha]] || [[word:ganarajaja|ganarajaja]] || [[word:ganarashasha|ganarashasha]] || [[word:ganaraka|ganaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ganarathan|ganarathan]] || [[word:ganarajan|ganarajan]] || [[word:ganarashan|ganarashan]] || [[word:ganarakan|ganarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ganarathaoro|ganarathaoro]] || [[word:ganarajaoro|ganarajaoro]] || [[word:ganarashaoro|ganarashaoro]] || [[word:ganarakaoro|ganarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
